filter-tree-geometry.title: Filter-tree Geometry System
filter-tree-geometry.guidance: Keep connector math and root-branch alignment centralized in the filter-tree variable system; do not fork local spacing rules in new filters.

radix-select-geometry.title: Radix Select Geometry
radix-select-geometry.guidance: Preserve runtime width, height, and transform-origin variables as a placement contract rather than converting them into fixed tokens.

token-covered.title: Token-covered Inventory
token-covered.policy: Keep these values as tracked inventory unless an output-equivalent replacement is intentionally performed.
token-covered.guidance: For future pages, reuse the existing token or alias instead of introducing new literals for the same metric.

geometry-exception.title: Geometry Exceptions
geometry-exception.policy: Do not treat runtime geometry, filter-tree connector math, or Radix variable-driven layout as generic token debt.
geometry-exception.guidance: Change only through dedicated variable systems or focused component-level geometry work with visual verification.

selector-state.title: Selector and State Syntax
selector-state.policy: Do not rewrite data-* or has-data-* state syntax as part of token cleanup.
selector-state.guidance: Touch these only when the component state model or primitive API actually changes.

behavior-layout.title: Behavior and Layout Expressions
behavior-layout.policy: Do not treat structural transition expressions as missing token coverage.
behavior-layout.guidance: Change these only when interaction behavior or layout semantics are intentionally redesigned.

review-needed.title: Review Needed
review-needed.policy: Any finding in this bucket is not yet covered by current governance and needs explicit review.
review-needed.guidance: This bucket should stay at zero; if it rises, classify or address the findings before doing broad cleanup.
